Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.qra

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.qra
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.qra
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.qra used by neqsim.process.safety.qra
    Class
    Description
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine
    High-level orchestrator for Quantitative Risk Analysis (QRA) of a single release scenario.
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.Consequence
    Plug-in interface for an arbitrary consequence model: distance → fatality probability.
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.OutcomeBranch
    Internal branch container.
    ConsequenceAnalysisEngine.OutcomeResult
    Result for one outcome branch at a receiver distance.
